column3: (Vulnerable JS Library - not applicable, no JS served)
(Cookie No HttpOnly - CSRF cookie must be JS-readable for double-submit pattern)
(Incomplete or No Cache-control Header - API returns no-store correctly)
(Cross-Domain JavaScript Source - Tailwind CDN used in reference server templates)
(User Controllable HTML Attribute - form action from server-side templates, not user input)
(Non-Storable Content - auth pages should not be cached)
(Modern Web Application - not applicable to API server)
(Authentication Request Identified - yes, this is an auth server)
(Session Management Response Identified - yes, sessions are expected)
(CSP unsafe-inline style-src - required by Tailwind CDN which injects inline styles)
(Sub Resource Integrity Missing - Tailwind CDN is dynamic, SRI would break on updates)
(Sec-Fetch-Dest Missing - ZAP sends synthetic requests without Sec-Fetch headers)
